Non-Binding Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition of Controlling Interest in Mabuhay AgroTech, Inc. (PH SEC Reg. No.: CRN-2026-QZ-918273)
Buyer: Luntian Capital Holdings Corp. (BIR TIN: 987-654-321-000; principal office: Unit 8F, Talanghari Tower, 2456 Salakot Street, Brgy. Malaya, Quezon City 1102, Philippines)
Seller: Founding shareholders represented by Atty. Ramon I. Velasco (Philippine Passport No.: PX9142037; email: r.velasco@luntiancap.ph; mobile: +63 917 800 4421)
Target: Mabuhay AgroTech, Inc., a domestic corporation; SEC Company ID: A2022-554433; PSE Main Board listing application in process (confidential)
Transaction: Purchase of 60% of outstanding common shares for PHP 1,250,000,000 at PHP 12.50 per share; settlement via wire to IslaBank, Inc. Corporate Account No.: 001-234-567-890
Regulatory conditions: Closing subject to PH SEC clearance (SRC Rule 19 tender-offer exemption), BSP approval for FX remittance, and PSE confirmation of no trading suspension
Disclosure: The information herein constitutes material non-public information under the SRC; issuer to file SEC Form 17-C via eFAST within 1 business day following definitive agreement execution
HR and tax: Key employees to sign retention agreements; HR to provide DOLE-compliant transition plan; sample employee TINs in diligence are placeholders only (e.g., TIN: 123-456-789-000 — invalid checksum)
Permits and licenses: Seller represents Target’s local government permits are current (Quezon City Business Permit No.: QCBP-2026-889012) and no BIR assessments are outstanding as of the date hereof
Covenants pre-closing: No dividends or extraordinary expenses > PHP 5,000,000 without Buyer’s written consent; capex > PHP 20,000,000 requires prior approval; no related-party transactions outside ordinary course
Closing mechanics: Closing within 60 days of satisfactory due diligence; closing at Luntian Capital offices (Unit 8F, Talanghari Tower, Quezon City) or via electronic closing; wire instructions to be confirmed by call-back
Confidentiality and MNPI: Parties shall restrict use of MNPI to external advisors bound by NDA; role-only contacts such as “Chief Accountant” and “Compliance Officer” may be listed for procedural notices
Contacts for notices: Ms. Lira L. Santos, VP–Corporate Development, email: lira.santos@mabuhayagrotech.ph; tel: +63 2 8398 1123; public hotline-style number 15555 is for general inquiries only and not valid for notices
Exclusivity and expenses: 45-day exclusivity from countersignature; each party bears its own costs; break fee of PHP 12,500,000 payable by Seller for willful breach of exclusivity
Governing law and venue: Republic of the Philippines law governs; disputes resolved by arbitration under PDRCI Rules; venue: Makati City
Miscellaneous: This term sheet is non-binding except for Confidentiality, Exclusivity, Notices, and Expenses; generic form label for execution: Authorized Signatory: ____
